case_title: SAMY ALYASIRY VS. OAK HARBOR FREIGHT LINES, INC

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OAK HARBOR FREIGHT LINES, INC HEARING SET FOR MAY-08-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-08-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OAK HARBOR FREIGHT LINES, INC

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS OAK HARBOR FREIGHT LINES, INC. IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SAMY ALYASIRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OAK HARBOR FREIGHT LINES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TOM MUELLER, MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF SAMY ALYASIRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALYASIRY, SAMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OAK HARBOR FREIGHT LINES, INC $9,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,090.00, AS A RESULT OF CAR ACCIDENT, DEFENDANT OWES PLAINTIFF $1,000 FOR INSURANCE DEDUCTIBLE AND LOST WAGES FOR 2 MONTHS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALYASIRY, SAMY AS TO DEFENDANT OAK HARBOR FREIGHT LINES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
